ham.subject: Your Amazon order #12345678 has been shipped – Track your delivery
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! We are excited to let you know that your order #12345678 has shipped and is on its way to you.

• Order total: ₹ 5,679.00
• Items: 2x "Wireless Earbuds", 1x "Smartwatch"
• Shipping Method: Amazon Prime – 1‑Day Delivery
• Estimated delivery: 05/10/2026

You can track your package here: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, please reply to this email or visit the Help Center.

Thanks for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx shipment delayed – Pay ₹2,500 to avoid cancellation
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Your FedEx shipment with tracking number 9W1234567890 has been delayed due to unforeseen circumstances. According to FedEx policy, a non‑delivery fee of ₹2,500.00 will be charged unless you pay immediately.

To avoid cancellation and ensure your package reaches you, please verify your payment details and complete the transaction within the next 48 hours.

Click here to securely pay: <URL>

Failure to comply will result in the shipment being returned to sender. If you believe this is an error, contact FedEx support immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
